seoTitle: Hoxton Park vs Humula — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hoxton Park and Humula. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hoxton Park vs Humula: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hoxton Park and Humula.
heading: Hoxton Park vs Humula — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hoxton Park, New South Wales and Humula, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Humula has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Hoxton Park (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hoxton Park or Humula safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hoxton Park has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Humula scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hoxton Park scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Humula scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hoxton Park or Humula?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Humula has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
